REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (657-659 15th Ave.)
Off Calendar Mar-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Ashley for Alson Lee (Petitioner).

The Court noted that an updated appraisal was received and that the bid is a qualifing bid. The bid was increased to $1,126,625.00 by Jerry Wang, Agent for Alexander and David Kwan based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt of the order). Additional bond is not required.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
